_notes: Drives the MIM Command Room page. All data is keyed by incident ID. smeRoster keys match the first word of the incident service name (e.g. 'GitLab', 'SAP', 'Nexus'). For a new customer: replace names, roles, orgs, avatar initials, tool references in chat messages and timeline events, and vendor names.

INC0008847.note: Auto-remediation succeeded — vendor support not engaged
OneEngine cleanup resolved without vendor involvement

INC0008841.note: Internal BASIS team resolved via SM37 + RZ10
E32s_v5 → E48s_v5 resize CHG0048299 raised for next maintenance window

Upstream Nexus fix resolved GitLab impact

INC0008847.msg: Bridge open — INC0008847 P1. GitLab CI down. 2,400 engineers blocked. Arjun, Priya — join now.
📊 RCA in progress. 23 OOM kills in 12 min. Root pattern matches INC0008811. Nexus disk 91% is upstream cause. Remediation plan ready — awaiting review.
Confirmed. K8s events showing heap exhaustion on all 8 runners. Nexus fetch timeouts 29s+ causing retry loops.
pod/gitlab-runner-7 logs confirm: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space. Pattern identical to last month.

✅ RCA confirmed. Causal chain: Nexus retention disabled 18d ago → 91% disk → 29s fetch timeout → JVM retry storm → OOM kill. Confidence 94%. Remediation: scale runners 8→24 + -Xmx 4g + Nexus cleanup. Risk score 14/100 — auto-approved.
Approved. Go ahead. I'll watch the HPA scale.
⚡ Executing: K8s HPA: 8→24 runners. ConfigMap: -Xmx 4g. NEXUS-CLEANUP initiated. ETA recovery: 6 min.
📈 Progress: Nexus 91%→74%. 16 new runners healthy. Pipeline queue: 847→412 jobs. Heap stable at 61%.
Queue draining fast. Looks good. Engineers won't notice.
✅ RESOLVED. Pipeline queue: 0 jobs. Nexus: 67%. All 24 runners GREEN. Retention policy re-enabled. MTTR: 11m 04s. Closing INC0008847 in ServiceNow.
Good work. Bridge closing. MIM report will be in your inbox. Arjun — let's review the retention policy in the next ops review.

INC0008841.msg: Bridge open — INC0008841 P1. SAP Finance down. Month-end close at risk. Anna, Ingrid — need you now. CFO is watching.
📊 Analysing SAP AP1. WP utilisation 89%. Three batch jobs competing in dialog class: FI_POST_CLOSE, GL_RECON, accruals. Azure VM CPU 87%. Remediation options ready.
Confirmed — SM50 shows WP pool exhausted. FI_POST_CLOSE needs dedicated WPs. GL_RECON can be deferred 20 min without compliance risk.
Finance teams are waiting. CFO has been notified. We need this fixed in the next 20 minutes or period-end close misses the 03:00 deadline.
✅ Plan: Defer GL_RECON + accruals via SM37 (20 min window). Increase dialog WPs 100→130 via RZ10. FI_POST_CLOSE gets dedicated class. Risk 42/100 — requires BASIS approval.
Approved. Execute the deferral and the WP increase. I'll validate RZ10 change after execution.
⚡ Executing: SM37 deferral complete. RZ10: 100→130 WPs. FI_POST_CLOSE now in dedicated batch class.
📈 WP utilisation: 89%→52%. FI_POST_CLOSE running cleanly. Finance users restoring. ETA full recovery: 5 min.
Finance team confirmed — they can see the system responding. Period-end on track.
✅ RESOLVED. SAP AP1 WP: 52%. Period-end close: on schedule. MTTR: 31 min. CFO deadline protected. INC0008841 closed.
Bridge closing. Anna — raise a CHG for the month-end WP reservation so this doesn't repeat. Good outcome.

INC0008844.msg: 🔴 P1 AUTO-DECLARED. Nexus /data 91%. GitLab CI dependency fetch >29s. Risk of GitLab runner OOM cascade in <30 min. Bridge opened. Sofia, Arjun paged.
On the bridge. Nexus admin console confirms — retention policy inactive. 1,847 SNAPSHOT artifacts uncleaned. Last enabled: 18 days ago.
✅ RCA confirmed: retention policy disabled during maintenance window — not re-enabled. NEXUS-CLEANUP runbook ready. Will reclaim 521GB. ETA: 8 min. Approve?
Approved. Run it. And notify the maintenance team — re-enable retention must be a mandatory post-maintenance checklist item going forward.
⚡ NEXUS-CLEANUP running. Targeting SNAPSHOTs >30 days across gitlab-runner-deps, sap-connectors, mobile-sdk. Retention policy re-enabled.
Watching GitLab side — CI pipelines still erroring but dependency fetch latency already dropping. 18s → 9s.
✅ RESOLVED. 521GB reclaimed. Nexus: 91%→38%. Fetch latency: 1.2s. All CI pipelines healthy. MTTR: 12 min. INC0008844 closed.
Clean. I'll update the maintenance runbook tonight. ZeroOps will KB this so the next team knows to watch for it.

INC0008847.msg: P1 auto-declared — GitLab CI runner OOM kill storm detected. 23 OOM events in 12 minutes. Pod gitlab-runner-7 restarting. JVM heap exhausted (-Xmx 2g). 847 pipeline jobs queued and growing at 40 jobs/minute. 2,400 R&D engineers blocked at workday start.

Alert storm de-duplicated: 847 raw alerts → 1 incident. All 23 OOM kills confirmed as single root cause event. INC0008847 created in ServiceNow. Priority P1 · Category: Availability. Routing to RCA Engine.

CMDB topology traversal complete. Required expertise: K8s/DevOps (runner pool), Nexus admin (disk), DC Infra (network). SMEs identified and paged: Arjun Mehta (DevOps Lead) via Teams + SMS · Priya Nair (K8s SRE) via Teams · Lars Eriksson (DC Infra) via Teams.

P1 DECLARED — INC0008847
Service: GitLab CI/CD Platform
Impact: 2,400 R&D engineers blocked · 847 pipeline jobs queued
Bridge: teams.microsoft.com/mim-0008847
Incident Manager: Raj Patel
ZeroOps RCA: In progress · Next update in 5 min

Causal chain identified:
1. Nexus /data partition at 91% — artifact fetch I/O degraded
2. Gradle dependency resolution timing out (29s vs 3s baseline)
3. GitLab runner JVM retry loop exhausting -Xmx 2g heap
4. OOM kill cascade across all 8 runners
Vector DB match: INC0008811 · 96% similarity · MTTR 11 min
Confidence: 94% · Runbook: GITLAB-RUNNER-OOM-HEAL
APPROVED: ZeroOps remediation plan — runner pool scale 8→24 via K8s HPA + JVM -Xmx 2g→4g via ConfigMap rolling restart + NEXUS-CLEANUP runbook. Risk 14/100 — auto-approved threshold met.
Step 1/5 — K8s HPA: runner pool scaling 8→24. New pods initialising in namespace gitlab-runners-prod. ConfigMap patched: JAVA_OPTS=-Xmx 4g. Rolling restart: 0/8 complete.

Step 2/5 — Rolling restart: 8/8 complete. All runners healthy with 4g heap. Step 3/5 — NEXUS-CLEANUP initiated: targeting SNAPSHOTs >30 days. gitlab-runner-dependencies (187GB), sap-connector-snapshots (241GB), mobile-sdk-snapshots (93GB).

UPDATE — INC0008847 (T+5 min)
Root cause: Nexus disk 91% → JVM retry storm → OOM kill
Remediation: In progress — runner pool scaled, Nexus cleanup running
Recovery ETA: 4 minutes
Step 4/5 — Nexus /data: 91%→67%. Artifact fetch latency: 29s→1.2s. Pipeline queue: 847→89 jobs draining. Step 5/5 — Validation: 24 runners GREEN · 0 OOM kills · JVM heap stable 61%.
Validation complete. Pipeline queue: 0 jobs. All 24 runners operating normally. Nexus retention policy re-enabled: 30-day / 5 versions per component. Full service restoration confirmed.
INC0008847 → AUTO-RESOLVED. MTTR: 11m 04s (vs 90 min manual estimate). Saved: ~79 min. 6 automated steps. 0 engineer actions required. Pattern stored in ZeroOps KB. MIM report generated.

INC0008841.msg: P1 auto-declared — SAP S/4HANA AP1 dialog WP saturation 89%. FI_POST_CLOSE batch running concurrently with GL_RECON and period-end accrual jobs in dialog WP class. Azure VM Standard_E32s_v5 CPU at 87%. 340 finance users experiencing session timeouts across 47 countries. CFO office escalated directly.

CMDB topology: SAP AP1 → Azure VM E32s_v5 → Finance domain. Required expertise: BASIS admin (WP config), NOC Lead (coordination), FI Process Owner (business impact), Azure Infra (VM scaling). SMEs paged: Anna Fischer (PagerDuty + SMS) · Raj Patel (Teams) · Ingrid Holm (Teams + Email) · Klaus Weber (Teams — standby).

Subject: SAP Finance P1 Update — INC0008841

Root cause confirmed: work process saturation during month-end batch.
Fix prepared and awaiting BASIS approval. ETA to restoration: 25 minutes.
Period-end close deadline (03:00) will be met.

Raj Patel · NOC Lead · Ericsson IT

APPROVED: Batch deferral GL_RECON + accruals via SM37 (20-min window). Dialog WP allocation increase 100→130 via RZ10. CFO deadline protected. Compliance validated — GL_RECON deferral within SOX-approved window. CHG0048291 logged.

SM37: GL_RECON batch deferred 20 minutes to 02:28. Accrual processing re-scheduled to background WP class. RZ10: dialog WP allocation 100→130 — no SAP restart required. FI_POST_CLOSE now executing in dedicated batch WP class.
WP utilisation: 89%→52%. FI_POST_CLOSE executing normally. Finance user sessions restoring. CPU: 87%→61%. Azure VM headroom restored. 340 users progressively reconnecting.

UPDATE — INC0008841 (T+17 min)
SAP Finance: RESTORED
WP utilisation: 52% (healthy)
Finance users: All 340 restored
Period-end close: On schedule
CFO deadline: PROTECTED
INC0008841 → RESOLVED. MTTR: 31 min (vs ~3h manual estimate). 1 Guardian gate · 7 automated steps · CFO deadline protected. CHG0048291 logged for month-end WP reservation. MIM report generated.

INC0008844.msg: P1 auto-declared — Nexus Artifactory /data partition at 91.4%. Build artifact fetch timeout >29s across all repositories. GitLab CI dependency resolution failing. Risk of full GitLab runner OOM cascade in <30 minutes (INC0008847 pattern detected).

Correlated: Nexus disk incident directly upstream of potential GitLab runner OOM (INC0008847 similarity 96%). Pre-emptive swarm activated before GitLab impact. INC0008844 created · P1 · Category: Capacity. Pattern: NEXUS-DISK-RETENTION-FAILURE.
SMEs paged: Sofia Reyes (Platform Engineer) via Teams + SMS · Arjun Mehta (DevOps Lead) via Teams. Bridge opened: teams.microsoft.com/mim-0008844. Note: Proactive swarm — GitLab not yet impacted.

Root cause confirmed:
1. SNAPSHOT retention policy disabled 18 days ago (maintenance window — not re-enabled)
2. 1,847 SNAPSHOT artifacts accumulated — 521GB since last cleanup
3. Nexus /data I/O degraded — fetch latency 29s vs 3s baseline
4. GitLab runner heap retry storm imminent
Remediation: NEXUS-CLEANUP runbook → reclaim 521GB. Risk 12/100.

APPROVED: NEXUS-CLEANUP runbook execution. Targeting SNAPSHOTs >30 days. Retention policy to be re-enabled and locked post-maintenance. KB article to be updated with mandatory re-enable checklist step.

NEXUS-CLEANUP executing: Phase 1 — gitlab-runner-dependencies: 187GB · Phase 2 — sap-connector-snapshots: 241GB · Phase 3 — mobile-sdk-snapshots: 93GB. Retention policy re-enabled: 30-day limit / 5 versions per component.
Progress: 312GB reclaimed. Nexus /data: 91%→62%. Artifact fetch latency dropping: 29s→11s. GitLab CI error rate declining.

NEXUS-CLEANUP complete. 521GB reclaimed. /data: 91%→38.1%. Fetch latency: 29s→1.2s. All GitLab CI pipelines healthy. Retention policy enforced and verified. Capacity headroom: 23 days at current build cadence.
INC0008844 → RESOLVED. MTTR: 12 min. 521GB reclaimed · 38% disk headroom · all pipelines healthy · retention enforced. GitLab runner cascade averted. MIM report generated. KB001 updated.
